---
title: "Workshop content"
subtitle: "NBIS_NEUNETDL_V26 • Neural Networks and Deep Learning"
description: "List of presentations"
listing:
  - id: slide-listings
    type: table
    grid-columns: 4
    fields: [session, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      session: "Session"
    sort: false
    contents:
      - ../rnn/lectures/index.qmd
  - id: lab-listings
    type: table
    grid-columns: 4
    sort: false
    fields: [session, title, description, notebook-url]
    field-display-names:
      notebook-url: "Jupyter Notebook"
      session: "Session"
    field-links:
      - title
      - notebook-url
    contents:
      - ../rnn/labs/airplanes.qmd
      - ../rnn/labs/alphabet.qmd
date: ""
toc: false
sidebar: true
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: full
---

### A note on usage

Html slides have been authored using [revealjs](https://revealjs.com/)
and can be viewed directly in the browser. In some cases, there are
accompanying speaker notes that can be viewed by pressing `s`.

### Slides

:::{#slide-listings}

:::

### Labs

:::{#lab-listings}

:::
